judgment.summary: Rapidly growing, profitable company with a reasonable forward P/E, but high leverage and slowing analyst growth estimates for the current fiscal year.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 6.3%; next earnings date is 2026-05-28.
positives: Earnings growth 170.8% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 173.9% indicate strong profitability improvements.
Forward P/E of 21.03 is attractive relative to trailing P/E of 67.97 and PEG ratio of 0.96.
Free cash flow of $836.12M TTM shows robust cash generation.
Gross margin of 77.4% is very healthy.
Consensus rating is 'buy' with a mean target price of $100.44.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 6.44 indicates significant leverage.
Analyst growth estimates for the current Q (-0.8%) and current FY (8.3%) are modest.
Return on equity of 3.5% and return on assets of 1.0% are relatively low.
Price/Sales (TTM) of 5.35 suggests the stock is not cheap on revenue multiples.

news.paragraph: Barclays suggests Okta (OKTA) may raise its fiscal 2027 guidance, citing improved demand and execution. This positive outlook comes just ahead of the company's next earnings report, which could serve as a catalyst for further upside if management confirms these trends. Traders should consider the potential for a guidance raise when evaluating options strategies.

headlines.title: Okta (OKTA) Could Raise Its Fiscal 2027 Guidance Amid Improved Demand And Execution, Says Barclays
